issue_title: Annotations created on iPad are not visible on Windows and Android.
issue_body_preview:
This is an awesome plugin! Thank you!

I use Obsidian sync.
I started annotating a document on Windows and wanted to continue on my iPad. Annotations created on my PC weren't visible on the iPad, but were visible on my other PCs and also on my Android phone. In Markdown view, I could see my "PC"
test_description_zh: 在不同设备（如iPad和Windows）上使用Obsidian Annotator插件对同一文档进行批注，通过Obsidian Sync同步后，在各设备上打开该批注文档，观察所有设备上创建的批注是否都能正常显示。
expected_result_zh: 在任意设备上创建的批注，同步后在其他所有设备（包括iPad、Windows、Android）上均应正确显示，不会出现某些设备创建的批注在其他设备上不可见的情况。
